metadata.name: Book an ADR Session for an Actor

description: A director has requested an Automated Dialogue Replacement (ADR) session for an actor to re-record some lines of dialogue.

nodes.task_description: Identify the scenes and lines that need to be re-recorded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of the specific dialogue to be recorded.

nodes.task_description: Check the actor's availability and the availability of the recording studio.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a time slot that works for both the actor and the studio.

nodes.task_description: Book the ADR session and send confirmations to the actor and the sound engineer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the studio and sends out calendar invites.
